title: aster sphaerotus
intro: Aster sphaerotus, also known as the white sage aster or western aster, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Aster sphaerotus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and support overall well-being.
